<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Argument\TimeSeries; use Predis\Command\Argument\ArrayableArgument; class InfoArguments implements ArrayableArgument { /** * @var array */ private $arguments = []; /** * Is an optional flag to get a more detailed information about the chunks. * * @return $this */ public function debug(): self { $this->arguments[] = 'DEBUG'; return $this; } /** * {@inheritDoc} */ public function toArray(): array { return $this->arguments; } }
